name: Flareon
shortDescription: When storing thermal energy in its body, its temperature could soar to over 1600 degrees.
description: When storing thermal energy in its body, its temperature could soar to over 1600 degrees.

name: Porygon
shortDescription: A POKéMON that consists entirely of programming code. Capable of moving freely in cyberspace.
description: A POKéMON that consists entirely of programming code. Capable of moving freely in cyberspace.

name: Omanyte
shortDescription: Although long extinct, in rare cases, it can be genetically resurrected from fossils.
description: Although long extinct, in rare cases, it can be genetically resurrected from fossils.

name: Omastar
shortDescription: A prehistoric POKéMON that died out when its heavy shell made it impossible to catch prey.
description: A prehistoric POKéMON that died out when its heavy shell made it impossible to catch prey.

name: Kabuto
shortDescription: A POKéMON that was resurrected from a fossil found in what was once the ocean floor eons ago.
description: A POKéMON that was resurrected from a fossil found in what was once the ocean floor eons ago.

name: Kabutops
shortDescription: Its sleek shape is perfect for swim­ ming. It slashes prey with its claws and drains the body fluids.
description: Its sleek shape is perfect for swim­ ming. It slashes prey with its claws and drains the body fluids.

name: Aerodactyl
shortDescription: A Pokémon that roamed the skies in the dinosaur era. Its teeth are like saw blades.
description: A Pokémon that roamed the skies in the dinosaur era. Its teeth are like saw blades.

name: Snorlax
shortDescription: Very lazy. Just eats and sleeps. As its rotund bulk builds, it becomes steadily more slothful.
description: Very lazy. Just eats and sleeps. As its rotund bulk builds, it becomes steadily more slothful.

name: Articuno
shortDescription: A legendary bird POKéMON that is said to appear to doomed people who are lost in icy mountains.
description: A legendary bird POKéMON that is said to appear to doomed people who are lost in icy mountains.

name: Zapdos
shortDescription: A legendary bird POKéMON that is said to appear from clouds while dropping enormous lightning bolts.
description: A legendary bird POKéMON that is said to appear from clouds while dropping enormous lightning bolts.

name: Moltres
shortDescription: Known as the legendary bird of fire. Every flap of its wings creates a dazzling flash of flames.
description: Known as the legendary bird of fire. Every flap of its wings creates a dazzling flash of flames.

name: Dratini
shortDescription: Long considered a mythical POKéMON until recently when a small colony was found living underwater.
description: Long considered a mythical POKéMON until recently when a small colony was found living underwater.

name: Dragonair
shortDescription: A mystical POKéMON that exudes a gentle aura. Has the ability to change climate conditions.
description: A mystical POKéMON that exudes a gentle aura. Has the ability to change climate conditions.

name: Dragonite
shortDescription: An extremely rarely seen marine POKéMON. Its intelligence is said to match that of humans.
description: An extremely rarely seen marine POKéMON. Its intelligence is said to match that of humans.

name: Mewtwo
shortDescription: It was created by a scientist after years of horrific gene splicing and DNA engineering experiments.
description: It was created by a scientist after years of horrific gene splicing and DNA engineering experiments.

name: Mew
shortDescription: So rare that it is still said to be a mirage by many experts. Only a few people have seen it worldwide.
description: So rare that it is still said to be a mirage by many experts. Only a few people have seen it worldwide.

name: Chikorita
shortDescription: A sweet aroma gently wafts from the leaf on its head. It is docile and loves to soak up the sun's rays.
description: A sweet aroma gently wafts from the leaf on its head. It is docile and loves to soak up the sun's rays.

name: Bayleef
shortDescription: The scent of spices comes from around its neck. Somehow, sniffing it makes you want to fight.
description: The scent of spices comes from around its neck. Somehow, sniffing it makes you want to fight.

name: Meganium
shortDescription: The aroma that rises from its petals contains a substance that calms aggressive feelings.
description: The aroma that rises from its petals contains a substance that calms aggressive feelings.

name: Cyndaquil
shortDescription: It has a timid nature. If it is startled, the flames on its back burn more vigorously.
description: It has a timid nature. If it is startled, the flames on its back burn more vigorously.

name: Quilava
shortDescription: Be careful if it turns its back during battle. It means that it will attack with the fire on its back.
description: Be careful if it turns its back during battle. It means that it will attack with the fire on its back.

name: Typhlosion
shortDescription: If its rage peaks, it becomes so hot that anything that touches it will instantly go up in flames.
description: If its rage peaks, it becomes so hot that anything that touches it will instantly go up in flames.

name: Totodile
shortDescription: Its well-developed jaws are powerful and capable of crushing anything. Even its trainer must be careful.
description: Its well-developed jaws are powerful and capable of crushing anything. Even its trainer must be careful.

name: Croconaw
shortDescription: If it loses a fang, a new one grows back in its place. There are always 48 fangs lining its mouth.
description: If it loses a fang, a new one grows back in its place. There are always 48 fangs lining its mouth.

name: Feraligatr
shortDescription: When it bites with its massive and powerful jaws, it shakes its head and savagely tears its victim up.
description: When it bites with its massive and powerful jaws, it shakes its head and savagely tears its victim up.

name: Sentret
shortDescription: A very cautious POKéMON, it raises itself up using its tail to get a better view of its surroundings.
description: A very cautious POKéMON, it raises itself up using its tail to get a better view of its surroundings.

name: Furret
shortDescription: It makes a nest to suit its long and skinny body. The nest is impossible for other POKéMON to enter.
description: It makes a nest to suit its long and skinny body. The nest is impossible for other POKéMON to enter.

name: Hoothoot
shortDescription: It always stands on one foot. It changes feet so fast, the movement can rarely be seen.
description: It always stands on one foot. It changes feet so fast, the movement can rarely be seen.

name: Noctowl
shortDescription: Its eyes are specially adapted. They concentrate even faint light and enable it to see in the dark.
description: Its eyes are specially adapted. They concentrate even faint light and enable it to see in the dark.

name: Ledyba
shortDescription: It is very timid. It will be afraid to move if it is alone. But it will be active if it is in a group.
description: It is very timid. It will be afraid to move if it is alone. But it will be active if it is in a group.

name: Ledian
shortDescription: When the stars flicker in the night sky, it flutters about, scattering a glowing powder.
description: When the stars flicker in the night sky, it flutters about, scattering a glowing powder.

name: Spinarak
shortDescription: It lies still in the same pose for days in its web, waiting for its unsuspecting prey to wander close.
description: It lies still in the same pose for days in its web, waiting for its unsuspecting prey to wander close.

name: Ariados
shortDescription: It spins string not only from its rear but also from its mouth. It is hard to tell which end is which.
description: It spins string not only from its rear but also from its mouth. It is hard to tell which end is which.

name: Crobat
shortDescription: It flies so si­ lently through the dark on its four wings that it may not be noticed even when nearby.
description: It flies so si­ lently through the dark on its four wings that it may not be noticed even when nearby.

name: Chinchou
shortDescription: Chinchou blink their shining antennae at one another to claim their respective turf.
description: Chinchou blink their shining antennae at one another to claim their respective turf.

name: Lanturn
shortDescription: The light it emits is so bright that it can illuminate the sea's surface from a depth of over three miles.
description: The light it emits is so bright that it can illuminate the sea's surface from a depth of over three miles.

name: Pichu
shortDescription: It is not yet skilled at storing electricity. It may send out a jolt if amused or startled.
description: It is not yet skilled at storing electricity. It may send out a jolt if amused or startled.

name: Cleffa
shortDescription: Because of its unusual, star-like silhouette, people believe that it came here on a meteor.
description: Because of its unusual, star-like silhouette, people believe that it came here on a meteor.

name: Igglybuff
shortDescription: It has a very soft body. If it starts to roll, it will bounce all over and be impossible to stop.
description: It has a very soft body. If it starts to roll, it will bounce all over and be impossible to stop.

name: Togepi
shortDescription: The shell seems to be filled with joy. It is said that it will share good luck when treated kindly.
description: The shell seems to be filled with joy. It is said that it will share good luck when treated kindly.

name: Togetic
shortDescription: They say that it will appear before kindhearted, car­ ing people and shower them with happiness.
description: They say that it will appear before kindhearted, car­ ing people and shower them with happiness.

name: Natu
shortDescription: Because its wings aren't yet fully grown, it has to hop to get around. It is always star­ ing at something.
description: Because its wings aren't yet fully grown, it has to hop to get around. It is always star­ ing at something.

name: Xatu
shortDescription: They say that it stays still and quiet because it is seeing both the past and future at the same time.
description: They say that it stays still and quiet because it is seeing both the past and future at the same time.

name: Mareep
shortDescription: If static elec­ tricity builds in its body, its fleece doubles in volume. Touching it will shock you.
description: If static elec­ tricity builds in its body, its fleece doubles in volume. Touching it will shock you.

name: Flaaffy
shortDescription: As a result of storing too much electricity, it developed patches where even downy wool won't grow.
description: As a result of storing too much electricity, it developed patches where even downy wool won't grow.

name: Ampharos
shortDescription: The tail's tip shines brightly and can be seen from far away. It acts as a beacon for lost people.
description: The tail's tip shines brightly and can be seen from far away. It acts as a beacon for lost people.

name: Bellossom
shortDescription: Plentiful in the tropics. When it dances, its petals rub together and make a pleasant ringing sound.
description: Plentiful in the tropics. When it dances, its petals rub together and make a pleasant ringing sound.

name: Marill
shortDescription: The tip of its tail, which con­ tains oil that is lighter than wa­ ter, lets it swim without drowning.
description: The tip of its tail, which con­ tains oil that is lighter than wa­ ter, lets it swim without drowning.

name: Azumarill
shortDescription: It lives in water virtually all day long. Its body color and pattern act as camouflage that makes it tough for enemies to spot in water.
description: It lives in water virtually all day long. Its body color and pattern act as camouflage that makes it tough for enemies to spot in water.

name: Sudowoodo
shortDescription: Although it always pretends to be a tree, its composi­ tion appears to be closer to a rock than a plant.
description: Although it always pretends to be a tree, its composi­ tion appears to be closer to a rock than a plant.

name: Politoed
shortDescription: If POLIWAG and POLIWHIRL hear its echoing cry, they respond by gather­ ing from far and wide.
description: If POLIWAG and POLIWHIRL hear its echoing cry, they respond by gather­ ing from far and wide.

name: Hoppip
shortDescription: To keep from being blown away by the wind, they gather in clusters. They do enjoy gentle breezes, though.
description: To keep from being blown away by the wind, they gather in clusters. They do enjoy gentle breezes, though.

name: Skiploom
shortDescription: The bloom on top of its head opens and closes as the temperature fluc­ tuates up and down.
description: The bloom on top of its head opens and closes as the temperature fluc­ tuates up and down.

name: Jumpluff
shortDescription: Once it catches the wind, it deft­ ly controls its cotton-puff spores to float, even around the world.
description: Once it catches the wind, it deft­ ly controls its cotton-puff spores to float, even around the world.

name: Aipom
shortDescription: Its tail is so powerful that it can use it to grab a tree branch and hold itself up in the air.
description: Its tail is so powerful that it can use it to grab a tree branch and hold itself up in the air.

name: Sunkern
shortDescription: It may drop out of the sky suddenly. If attacked by a SPEAROW, it will violently shake its leaves.
description: It may drop out of the sky suddenly. If attacked by a SPEAROW, it will violently shake its leaves.

name: Sunflora
shortDescription: It converts sun­ light into energy. In the darkness after sunset, it closes its petals and becomes still.
description: It converts sun­ light into energy. In the darkness after sunset, it closes its petals and becomes still.

name: Yanma
shortDescription: If it flaps its wings really fast, it can generate shock waves that will shatter win­ dows in the area.
description: If it flaps its wings really fast, it can generate shock waves that will shatter win­ dows in the area.

name: Wooper
shortDescription: This POKéMON lives in cold water. It will leave the water to search for food when it gets cold outside.
description: This POKéMON lives in cold water. It will leave the water to search for food when it gets cold outside.

name: Quagsire
shortDescription: This carefree POKéMON has an easy-going nature. While swimming, it always bumps into boat hulls.
description: This carefree POKéMON has an easy-going nature. While swimming, it always bumps into boat hulls.

name: Espeon
shortDescription: It uses the fine hair that covers its body to sense air currents and predict its ene­ my's actions.
description: It uses the fine hair that covers its body to sense air currents and predict its ene­ my's actions.

name: Umbreon
shortDescription: When agitated, this POKéMON pro­ tects itself by spraying poisonous sweat from its pores.
description: When agitated, this POKéMON pro­ tects itself by spraying poisonous sweat from its pores.

name: Murkrow
shortDescription: Feared and loathed by many, it is believed to bring misfortune to all those who see it at night.
description: Feared and loathed by many, it is believed to bring misfortune to all those who see it at night.

name: Slowking
shortDescription: It has incredible intellect and in­ tuition. Whatever the situation, it remains calm and collected.
description: It has incredible intellect and in­ tuition. Whatever the situation, it remains calm and collected.

name: Misdreavus
shortDescription: It likes playing mischievous tricks such as screaming and wailing to startle people at night.
description: It likes playing mischievous tricks such as screaming and wailing to startle people at night.

name: Unown
shortDescription: Their shapes look like hieroglyphs on ancient tab­ lets. It is said that the two are somehow related.
description: Their shapes look like hieroglyphs on ancient tab­ lets. It is said that the two are somehow related.

name: Wobbuffet
shortDescription: It hates light and shock. If attack­ ed, it inflates its body to pump up its counter­ strike.
description: It hates light and shock. If attack­ ed, it inflates its body to pump up its counter­ strike.

name: Girafarig
shortDescription: Its tail has a small brain of its own. Beware! If you get close, it may react to your scent and bite.
description: Its tail has a small brain of its own. Beware! If you get close, it may react to your scent and bite.

name: Pineco
shortDescription: It likes to make its shell thicker by adding layers of tree bark. The additional weight doesn't bother it.
description: It likes to make its shell thicker by adding layers of tree bark. The additional weight doesn't bother it.

name: Forretress
shortDescription: Its entire body is shielded by a steel-hard shell. What lurks inside the armor is a total mystery.
description: Its entire body is shielded by a steel-hard shell. What lurks inside the armor is a total mystery.

name: Dunsparce
shortDescription: When spotted, this POKéMON escapes backward by furi­ ously boring into the ground with its tail.
description: When spotted, this POKéMON escapes backward by furi­ ously boring into the ground with its tail.

name: Gligar
shortDescription: It flies straight at its target's face then clamps down on the star­ tled victim to inject poison.
description: It flies straight at its target's face then clamps down on the star­ tled victim to inject poison.

name: Steelix
shortDescription: It is thought its body transformed as a result of iron accumulating internally from swallowing soil.
description: It is thought its body transformed as a result of iron accumulating internally from swallowing soil.

name: Snubbull
shortDescription: Although it looks frightening, it is actually kind and affectionate. It is very popular among women.
description: Although it looks frightening, it is actually kind and affectionate. It is very popular among women.

name: Granbull
shortDescription: It is actually timid and easily spooked. If at­ tacked, it flails about to fend off its attacker.
description: It is actually timid and easily spooked. If at­ tacked, it flails about to fend off its attacker.

name: Qwilfish
shortDescription: To fire its poison spikes, it must inflate its body by drinking over 2.6 gallons of water all at once.
description: To fire its poison spikes, it must inflate its body by drinking over 2.6 gallons of water all at once.

name: Scizor
shortDescription: It has a steel-hard body. It intimidates foes by upraising its eye-patterned pincers.
description: It has a steel-hard body. It intimidates foes by upraising its eye-patterned pincers.

name: Shuckle
shortDescription: The BERRIES it stores in its vase-like shell decompose and become a gooey liquid.
description: The BERRIES it stores in its vase-like shell decompose and become a gooey liquid.

name: Heracross
shortDescription: It is usually docile, but if it is disturbed while sipping honey, it chases off the intruder with its horn.
description: It is usually docile, but if it is disturbed while sipping honey, it chases off the intruder with its horn.

name: Sneasel
shortDescription: Its paws conceal sharp claws. If attacked, it sud­ denly extends the claws and startles its enemy.
description: Its paws conceal sharp claws. If attacked, it sud­ denly extends the claws and startles its enemy.

name: Teddiursa
shortDescription: If it finds honey, its crescent mark glows. It always licks its paws because they are soaked with honey.
description: If it finds honey, its crescent mark glows. It always licks its paws because they are soaked with honey.

name: Ursaring
shortDescription: Although it is a good climber, it prefers to snap trees with its forelegs and eat fallen BERRIES.
description: Although it is a good climber, it prefers to snap trees with its forelegs and eat fallen BERRIES.

name: Slugma
shortDescription: It never sleeps. It has to keep moving because if it stopped, its magma body would cool and harden.
description: It never sleeps. It has to keep moving because if it stopped, its magma body would cool and harden.

name: Magcargo
shortDescription: The shell on its back is just skin that has cooled and hardened. It breaks easily with a slight touch.
description: The shell on its back is just skin that has cooled and hardened. It breaks easily with a slight touch.

name: Swinub
shortDescription: It rubs its snout on the ground to find and dig up food. It sometimes discovers hot springs.
description: It rubs its snout on the ground to find and dig up food. It sometimes discovers hot springs.

name: Piloswine
shortDescription: Because the long hair all over its body obscures its sight, it just keeps charging repeatedly.
description: Because the long hair all over its body obscures its sight, it just keeps charging repeatedly.

name: Corsola
shortDescription: It continuously sheds and grows. The tip of its head is prized as a treasure for its beauty.
description: It continuously sheds and grows. The tip of its head is prized as a treasure for its beauty.

name: Remoraid
shortDescription: It has superb ac­ curacy. The water it shoots out can strike even moving prey from more than 300 feet.
description: It has superb ac­ curacy. The water it shoots out can strike even moving prey from more than 300 feet.

name: Octillery
shortDescription: It traps enemies with its suction- cupped tentacles then smashes them with its rock-hard head.
description: It traps enemies with its suction- cupped tentacles then smashes them with its rock-hard head.

name: Delibird
shortDescription: It carries food all day long. There are tales about lost people who were saved by the food it had.
description: It carries food all day long. There are tales about lost people who were saved by the food it had.

name: Mantine
shortDescription: As it majestically swims, it doesn't care if REMORAID attach to it for scavenging its leftovers.
description: As it majestically swims, it doesn't care if REMORAID attach to it for scavenging its leftovers.

name: Skarmory
shortDescription: Its sturdy wings look heavy, but they are actually hollow and light, allowing it to fly freely in the sky.
description: Its sturdy wings look heavy, but they are actually hollow and light, allowing it to fly freely in the sky.

name: Houndour
shortDescription: It uses different kinds of cries for communicating with others of its kind and for pursuing its prey.
description: It uses different kinds of cries for communicating with others of its kind and for pursuing its prey.

name: Houndoom
shortDescription: If you are burned by the flames it shoots from its mouth, the pain will never go away.
description: If you are burned by the flames it shoots from its mouth, the pain will never go away.

name: Kingdra
shortDescription: It is said that it usually hides in underwater caves. It can create whirlpools by yawning.
description: It is said that it usually hides in underwater caves. It can create whirlpools by yawning.

name: Phanpy
shortDescription: It swings its long snout around play­ fully, but because it is so strong, that can be dan­ gerous.
description: It swings its long snout around play­ fully, but because it is so strong, that can be dan­ gerous.

name: Donphan
shortDescription: It has sharp, hard tusks and a rugged hide. Its TACKLE is strong enough to knock down a house.
description: It has sharp, hard tusks and a rugged hide. Its TACKLE is strong enough to knock down a house.

name: Porygon2
shortDescription: This upgraded version of PORYGON is designed for space exploration. It can't fly, though.
description: This upgraded version of PORYGON is designed for space exploration. It can't fly, though.

name: Stantler
shortDescription: The curved antlers subtly change the flow of air to create a strange space where real­ ity is distorted.
description: The curved antlers subtly change the flow of air to create a strange space where real­ ity is distorted.

name: Smeargle
shortDescription: A special fluid oozes from the tip of its tail. It paints the fluid everywhere to mark its territory.
description: A special fluid oozes from the tip of its tail. It paints the fluid everywhere to mark its territory.
